mapper.sql: er.id, er.exam_id, er.paper_id, er.student_id, er.start_time, er.submit_time, er.total_score, er.objective_score, er.subjective_score, er.status, er.create_time, er.update_time, e.name as exam_name, p.name as paper_name, s.name as student_name
mapper.select: select from exam_record er left join exam e on er.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on er.paper_id = p.id left join student s on er.student_id = s.id where er.id = #{id}
select from exam_record er left join exam e on er.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on er.paper_id = p.id left join student s on er.student_id = s.id order by er.create_time desc

select from exam_record er left join exam e on er.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on er.paper_id = p.id left join student s on er.student_id = s.id where er.exam_id = #{examId} and er.student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: insert into exam_record(exam_id, paper_id, student_id, start_time, submit_time, total_score, objective_score, subjective_score, status) values(#{examId}, #{paperId}, #{studentId}, #{startTime}, #{submitTime}, #{totalScore}, #{objectiveScore}, #{subjectiveScore}, #{status})
mapper.delete:
delete from exam_record where id in
#{id}
